All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
EndStage
Custom Stage class that represents the Game Over or Results window.
EndStageController
Controller class for the Game Over / Results screen.
GameAdapter
An abstract adapter class for receiving game events.
GameController
Main controller for the game session.
GameEventListener
Interface that defines a listener for game-related events.
GameStage
Custom Stage class that represents the main game window.
HomeController
Controller class for the Home/Main Menu view of the application.
HomeStage
Custom Stage class that represents the Main Menu (Home) window of the application.
IScore
Interface defining the contract for the game's scoring and progress management.
ITime
Interface defining the contract for the game's time management system.
IWords
Interface defining the essential contract for word management in the typing game.
Main
Main entry point for the Typing Game application.
Score
Manages the game's scoring system, tracking points, errors, seasons, and chapters.
Time
Manages the countdown timer logic for the game.
Words
Class responsible for managing the game's word bank.
